programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: While Link and Zelda are at Lanas royal ball the furious Mother Brain fires Eggplant Wizard and King Hippo for failing to capture the Triforce So Eggplant Wizard and King Hippo steal the Triforce pieces for themselves

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Fastest Gun Alive
programme.desc: In the western frontier town of Cross Creek storekeeper George Temple is a polite and soft spoken man with a secret past When 3 bank robbers on the lam stop in town to change horses Georges past comes back to haunt him

programme.title: Arizona Days
programme.desc: Arizona Days

programme.title: Days of Jesse James
programme.desc: A bank robbery pulled off by the bank officials not the usual James gang

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Caddyshack 2
programme.desc: A real estate tycoon vows revenge when his membership in a luxurious club is rejected So he strikes back by buying the club and turning it into an amusement park

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: Shaolin Super Dragon
programme.desc: Shaolin Super Dragon

programme.title: Invincible Super Chan
programme.desc: Invincible Super Chan

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin and Pit are on their way back from Dragons Den when they get ambushed by the Sheriff of Nottinghams soldiers Kevin and Pit join forces with Robin Hood to defeat the Sheriff

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claw steals the big red ruby of India to use in his superlaser to destroy US communications satellites

programme.title: The Grape Ape

programme.title: Hong 103

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Forgotten Gunners Of WWI
programme.desc: The team explores the grounds around Belton House near Grantham which were home to thousands of men training for frontline duties in WWI

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Four boys find out that the local undertaker and a pharmacist are in cahoots to murder rich locals and profit from their funerals

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An alcoholic reporter is inspired by a beautiful woman to find a good murder case no matter what

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A troubled investigator looks into the suicide of a priest in an abandoned convent

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Ambitious first-time film director Alex Nolan is having trouble eliciting a good and believable performance out of lovely but inexperienced lead actress Leda Bedell Alex decides to use unorthodox methods to coax more credible and effective acting from Leda for the crucial final scene of the horror movie theyre working on together

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Determined to prevent Nick from taking all the glory for solving another murder case Schanke captures the killer on his own -- or so he thinks

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan pose as members of a religious sect to track down a patchwork quilt that is thought to have deadly powers

programme.title: Children of the Corn
programme.desc: Two lovers stumble across a small American town where local children have killed the adult population in a bizarre ritual

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddy harasses a young medical student on Halloween night driving her to the brink of madness and beyond

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Theres a new game warden in town and his name is George MacMichael

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa and Luke give Kate a break from her family chores including the cooking

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is assigned to protect the winner of the Miss USA contest

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: An Arabian prince is protected by Max and an Israeli agent

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ relocates to California and assembles a team of lady truckers to run a lucrative load from Los Angeles to San Francisco But BJs operation threatens to derail the gravy trains of Trans Cal Trucking and SCAT Captain Rutherford T Grant

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur bets an old college rival 5 bills that Ed can out-jump his horse He has second thoughts after he realizes that 5 bills equals 500

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol and Wilbur convert the barn into a temporary polling precinct so Ed wants to vote too

programme.title: Hogans 320
programme.desc: Hogans 320

programme.title: Hogans 230
programme.desc: Hogans 230

programme.title: Mchale 336
programme.desc: Mchale 336

programme.title: Mchale 404
programme.desc: Mchale 404

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter asks Gomer to take his place on a date

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carters adopted Korean daughter arrives-but shes not the little girl he remembers

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan and The Skipper find a government briefcase with top-secret information in the lagoon and when Gilligan handcuffs himself to the briefcase he becomes afraid that the enemy will come to the island and kill him

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A smooth-talking criminal comes to the island and holds the women on the island hostage in exchange for ransom money but when he is captured they decide to try and reform him instead of holding him prisoner

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget

programme.title: Bulletproof
programme.desc: A group of terrorists seize the Thunderblast top-secret super tank hiding it in Mexico The task of recovering it is entrusted to Frank McBain a former secret agent and current cop

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Conclusion At their high-school reunion Julie and her former boyfriend find theyll still attracted to each other

programme.title: WKRP 215
programme.desc: WKRP 215

programme.title: WKRP 101
programme.desc: WKRP 101

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Taylor and Aimee Hilary Swajk elope and get married

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: In the series pilot Wood Newton a former NFL football player and the head coach of the local high school football team has to deal with his teams losing streak and the possible pregnancy of his wife

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Faded singer Ginny Gordons comeback is threatened and her sanity imperiled by attempts on her life Is her former partner responsible for the attempts or is a recent acquaintance terrorizing her

programme.title: Hercules 205
programme.desc: Hercules 205

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A joint Doors InternationalTaelon venture creates a machine that allows people to vividly relive a memory but Liam suspects a back alley version of the device is leading to the death of some users

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: War of the Worlds

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: After an eletrical explosion in his lab apparently kills Arcane our arch fiend finds himself on trial in a nightmarish comedy of his crimes against his victims

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: How will Swamp Thing deal with a man who has captured footage of him on film and the deadly creatures released into the swamp

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Maintenance technician Ted Clifford is possessed by an eerie yellow glow which ultimately kills him It transpires that it is coming from a planet called Triton which captures the Alphans and insists that Helena should become the Eyes of Triton Before long she is acting just as Ted Clifford did before his death

programme.title: Demons 2
programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke learn that their artist friend Grannie Annie is the mastermind behind a small-time counterfeiting ring After her arrest Boss seizes the engraving plates to sell to no-nonsense counterfeiter Big John Downey Bo and Luke work to clear Annies name unaware that their efforts may have deadly consequences for Boss

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: After Jeannies friend Nancy kills one of her rapists Jeannie is furious at the way the justice system works She becomes involved with an aggressive rape crisis group headed by crusading attorney Catherine Wyatt Rapist Jack Marlin becomes a target of their efforts

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: An enemy agents kidnapped 2 scientists and their wives and is holding them in San Francisco He wants a third scientist who can help develop an ultimate weapon Phelps devises a plan where hell pose as the scientist being sought whilst the rest of the IM force fakes an earthquake

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon have less than two hours to find the dog that bit a little girl five days earlier Normally treatment consists of serum injections followed by vaccine inoculations but in this case the girl is highly allergic to the anti-rabies serum and it could kill her

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Frank Barker wants Joe to help him get a firearms license for the Fielder Militia The LAPD knows that the militias weapons are stolen from the Army so they have Joe string Barker along until they can arrest him and grab the weapons

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Dr Kimble wants to expose a defect in the bloodline of a kennel owners dog but the son and daughter-in-law threaten to stop him

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: The once friendly annual rodeo between the Barkley and Morton ranches has become a nasty win-at-all-costs event An ex-slave super cowboy raises the stakes when he agrees to compete for the Barkleys

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne rides into a town looking for a job He runs into a hired killer he knows who tries to kill him but is shot by the local sheriff Once he learns who the man was the sheriff hires Cheyenne to work undercover to find who hired him

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Cody is asked to join a group of traveling actors unknowingly taking part in a plot to assassinate a US general

programme.desc: The same woman Karen Black appears in three tales as a blackmailed teacher a tormented lover and opposite sisters

programme.desc: Construction workers Clint Walker Carl Betz Neville Brand battle an unmanned bulldozer energized by an alien force

programme.title: The Slumber Party Massacre

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chris Smeltzer's journey into MMA began 12 years ago, through Karate. Chris' work as a School Bus driver fits perfectly with his MMA lifestyle, allowing him the flexibility to train throughout the day, as well run a karate school for kids. The martial artist lifestyle helped bring structure to all areas of Chris' life. He believes he has become a better person through Martial Arts, and he makes the mental distinction between between being a fighter and being Martial Artist. He prefers the standup game feels he is progressing well to being an all around fighter with his BJJ Blue Belt.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Isaiah Burkhalter at HK52.

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian leads the ship and Jayce to where all time meets and one can see into the future After passing several secret tests that show his goodness and courage Jayce is allowed to see his future which shows his father being destroyed

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Audrics image is being projected from a body of water on a planet Jayce goes down to investigate even though Monster Minds are busy draining the water off Jayce meets the fish people the XHal and the Old One and they communicate by telepathy

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Maori Chief Kaitaia has a map to Glow Worm Grotto tattooed on his back VENOM needs this information to find the grotto and steal the pearl treasure inside

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: A radioactive meteor crashes on Earth and VENOM steals it by disguising Switchblade as a UFO

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger

programme.desc: The GoBots are forced into a grudging alliance to defeat a race of enormous metal-eating spiders
